description: Unicode and special characters: CJK, RTL (Arabic/Hebrew), emoji, math symbols, currency, typographic chars, accented chars, box-drawing, combining marks
visual_assertions: CJK characters (你好世界, こんにちは, 안녕하세요) should render as recognizable glyphs, not boxes or question marks
Arabic and Hebrew text (مرحبا, שלום) should appear with correct RTL reading order
Emoji characters should either render as visible glyphs or fall back gracefully without causing crashes
Greek letters (α β γ δ etc.) should render correctly
Mathematical operators (±, ×, ÷, ∞, ∑, ∫) should render as their correct symbols
Currency symbols ($, €, £, ¥, ₹, ₿) should render correctly in the table
The box-drawing characters (┌──┬──┐ etc.) in the pre block should render as a coherent grid
Accented Latin characters (àâæçéèêë, äöüß, áéíóúñ) should render correctly without substitution
Em-dash (—), en-dash (–), ellipsis (…), and curly quotes should render as their correct typographic forms
